payload.answer: I can help capture this as a memory, but I need to avoid deciding or saving it here. Since this appears to be an additive preference fact, please choose how you’d like to handle it.
repair_options: Add a separate memory that Sam from Goldman mentioned he likes Bill Evans.
If there is already an existing Sam-from-Goldman profile, add Bill Evans as an additional liked artist/person for that Sam.
Keep any existing Sam-related memories unchanged and store this as a separate contextual note from Slack.
